# Architecture Proposal: Hub & Spoke Polyrepo

## 1. Directory Restructuring
- Create `/root/.openclaw/workspace/projects/`
- Move `AMS`, `leio-sdlc`, `ClawOS`, `pm-skill`, `skill_util` into `projects/`.
- Add `projects/` to the global `/root/.openclaw/workspace/.gitignore`.

## 2. Git Boundaries
- The global workspace `/root/.openclaw/workspace/` remains a Git repository, tracking global configs (`AGENTS.md`), global tasks (`.issues/`), and global PRDs (`docs/PRDs/`).
- Each folder in `projects/` (e.g., `projects/AMS`) will run `git init` and become an entirely independent Git repository.

## 3. SDLC Orchestrator Execution
- The orchestrator will be invoked against a specific sub-repo: 
  `python3 orchestrator.py --workdir /root/.openclaw/workspace/projects/AMS --prd-file /root/.openclaw/workspace/docs/PRDs/PRD_xxx.md`
- The orchestrator will read the global PRD, but execute all git commands, branch creations, and sub-agent spawns strictly within the isolated `--workdir` (the independent Git repo).
- PR contracts (e.g., `PR_001.md`) generated by the Planner will be saved inside the sub-repo (e.g., `projects/AMS/docs/PRs/PRD_xxx/`).
